events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Former Beatles drummer Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Drum legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 86th birthday to the legendary Ringo Starr! From the Fab Four to his All-Starr Band, his rhythm is iconic.

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist, Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday today.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the rock legend and astrophysicist, Brian May! His guitar riffs with Queen are truly out of this world.

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The legendary frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday today.

angles.name: Still Rolling
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young and still commanding the stage! Happy Birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger. What's your favourite Stones track?

events.title: MTV launched in the USA
events.blurb: On August 1, 1981, MTV launched in the United States, famously kicking off with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star'.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: Remember when music videos changed everything? Forty-five years ago today, MTV launched in the USA, forever altering how we experienced music.

events.title: Oasis released 'Definitely Maybe'
events.blurb: Oasis released their iconic debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, featuring classics like 'Supersonic' and 'Live Forever'.

angles.name: Britpop Classic
angles.copy: Thirty-two years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed the sound of British music. What's your favourite track from the album?

events.title: Woodstock Festival anniversary
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, 'Three Days of Peace & Music', took place from August 15-18, 1969, on a dairy farm in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago today, hundreds of thousands gathered for Woodstock, an iconic moment of peace, love, and incredible music. Imagine being there!

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death
events.blurb: Today marks the 49th anniversary of the passing of 'The King of Rock & Roll', Elvis Presley, who died on August 16, 1977.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Forty-nine years today since we lost The King. Elvis Presley's music and legacy continue to inspire generations. What's your top Elvis track?

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's death
events.blurb: Today marks 30 years since the passing of influential rapper Tupac Shakur, who died on September 13, 1996, after being shot in Las Vegas.

angles.name: Remembering Tupac
angles.copy: Thirty years ago, the music world lost a legend. Remembering Tupac Shakur and his profound impact on hip-hop and culture.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's death
events.blurb: Today marks 56 years since the passing of guitar icon Jimi Hendrix, who died on September 18, 1970.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Fifty-six years since the world lost a true guitar visionary. Remembering Jimi Hendrix and his unparalleled influence on music.

events.title: The Beatles released 'Abbey Road'
events.blurb: The Beatles' eleventh studio album, 'Abbey Road', was released in the UK on September 26, 1969, featuring the iconic zebra crossing cover.

angles.name: Iconic Album
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago, The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover is still one of the most famous in history!

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' frontwoman, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Rock Icon
angles.copy: Happy 75th Birthday to the legendary Chrissie Hynde! A true rock icon, still delivering those powerful vocals with The Pretenders.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and Beady Eye frontman, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday today.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Star
angles.copy: Happy 54th Birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing that swagger and those anthems. What's your favourite Liam moment?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' UK single release
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic song 'Imagine' was released as a single in the UK in October 1975.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: Forty-one years since John Lennon's timeless anthem 'Imagine' was released as a single in the UK. Its message of peace still resonates today.

events.title: Apple unveiled the first iPod
events.blurb: Apple announced the revolutionary first-generation iPod on October 23, 2001, promising '1,000 songs in your pocket'.

angles.name: Pocket Full of Music
angles.copy: Twenty-five years ago, the world changed with the announcement of the first iPod. Suddenly, 1,000 songs were in our pockets!

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: James Bond Day celebrates the premiere of the first 007 film, 'Dr. No', which took place on October 5, 1962.

angles.name: Shaken Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Celebrating 64 years since 007 first hit the big screen. What's your favourite Bond film or theme tune?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today. He was born on October 9, 1940.

angles.name: Remembering John Lennon
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the visionary John Lennon. His music and message continue to inspire.
